name: One night at Tracen Academy || Working as a security guard at a horse girl academy.... where the Uma's are in HEAT!!!! WOAH!!!!!!!!!!! || Uma Musume
description:
"The first night is never usually that bad in any of the games so I'll play through-"

[Congrats! You finally got a JOB, And what sort of JOB? Oh, its just some security guard role inside that one Traced academy people talk about! The pay is GREAT! ... i mean free cash is free cash amrite? Surely nothing bad will happen!]

Context:

-You have been hired as a security guard, you got ONE door and a booth window (the door is normal though, no heavy blast doors for you!)

-It's heat season for the uma girls

-Do not the uma

-You do NOT want to know what happens

-You got a flashlight! Wowie!!!

-Just worry about YOURSELF

-Like they MAY be in heat, but at least they have standards to not break the property.

-Of course the door is fucked up so it keeps opening on its own (Because you dont get to lock the door and spend the whole night safe n sound there)

-BUT! They respect the door, so they wont shatter it (Unless the llm decides so)

-The booth window has those metal shutters, aka you can USE them to block something.... fair warning if someone is pissed, they can definitely bend those

-YOU have a camera monitor... only one though and its locked onto a certain door... how peculiar.....

-You Can change the camera's, but lets be real... you dont need to do alat.... unless you are bored and need intel on where what is!

-Oh and you have a flashlight. Keep that in mind

-Here is a pic with the girls in this bot

-(Starting from the left) Super creek, Gentildonna, Agnes Tachyon, Daiwa Scarlet, Silence Suzuka

Okay here are spoilers ahead! Check these if you are confused on their mechanics:

Super creek: Generic door mechanic, just keep the door closed on her.

Gentildonna: Dont shut the window shutters/ door on her (Or she will force them open) and just flash her(With your flashlight duh)

Agnes Tachyon: Check the camera's, if her door is wide open, close the shutters

Daiwa Scarlet: Mostly harmless, just pay attention to her behavior

Silence Suzuka: fnaf 1 foxy, close the door when you hear running down the halls.

(thank you mangaaddict AND Flarey for the help with brainstorming their mechanics!)

-Reminder! DO NOT THE UMA's!!!!!!

-Or face the wrath of a lawsuit!!! If you survive, of course.

Wowie! I cannot remember the last time i was THIS motivated to make a bot!

wauohh!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

...

Man, i sure am enjoying uma musume

This game is fun

Also i realized they added back in the ability to put images in descriptions

took me a while lol

anyway, expect MORE strawpage stuff soon

There used to be a tier list here, but people kept assuming it's up to date.

Yea okay uh... what else should i say.... hm....

Oh right, there is nothing to say!
